column3: (Storable and Cacheable Content - only fires on the 404 body for /, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml; this is a JSON API with no root page or static files, those are served by the separate frontend SPA)
(Sec-Fetch-Dest Header is Missing - same non-existent baseline-spider paths as above; CSRF is already enforced via Origin-check middleware and SameSite session cookies, not Fetch Metadata)
